title: Procedural Generation with MGD President Zachary Shade
description: Learn how to generate dynamic environments using procedural techniques. Perfect if your into game dev, world-building, or want to make your scenes feel alive
location: Room H962, Hall Building 1455 Blvd. de Maisonneuve Ouest, Sir George William Campus

title: Line Art Workshop with Dario
description: Curious about drawing but not sure where to start? Join artist Dario Cimmino for a relaxed, beginner-friendly introduction to line art where you’ll explore digital tips, learn how to draw heads and facial features, and discover helpful tricks to begin your artistic journey.
location: Room H962, Hall Building 1455 Blvd. de Maisonneuve Ouest, Sir George William Campus

title: Shrekathon
description: Hosted by Concordia Game Dev Club, Shrekathon is a 48-hour event GameJam.
